title: Rich Tunisian Almond Fritters
description: A savory, bitter and gooey fritter that serves as a hearty solo dinner. The almond butter batter is enriched with bitter orange zest for a uniquely Tunisian flavor.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk the almond butter and maple syrup until smooth.
Add the eggs and whisk again until fully incorporated.
Stir in the almond flour, coconut flour, ground ginger, cinnamon, salt, and bitter orange zest until a thick batter forms.
Heat the olive oil in a nonstick skillet over medium heat until shimmering.
Drop spoonfuls of the batter into the skillet and cook each fritter for 3-4 minutes on each side until golden and set.
Transfer cooked fritters to a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve warm with a drizzle of additional maple syrup or a sprinkle of pistachios if desired.
